creator: wmoran@collaborativefusion.com
text:
Just ran through and tested this.  Can't find any problems, so go ahead
and commit the patch, pls.

Thanks to Svyatoslav for the patch!

On Sat, 11 Feb 2012 14:10:14 UT Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Maintainer of devel/php-xdebug,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/164978 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/164978
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org


-- 
Bill Moran <wmoran@collaborativefusion.com>
